notes: PG-182 hardening pass completed 2026-04-14. Addressed audit findings: (1) duplicateRules.updateAll wrapped in $transaction, skipDuplicates dropped, Zod superRefine rejects duplicate (field, strategy) pairs, Save button disabled on conflict; (2) unsafe double-cast on tagsQuery removed by widening TagRow.colorToken to string + safe lookup fallback; (3) Required Fields policy is NOW ENFORCED on contact.create/update via assertRequiredContactFields — no longer policy-only; (4) data-hygiene toggles (normalizePhone, capitalizeName, preventDeleteWithOpenDeals, restrictTagCreationToAdmins) are wired in contact.router + contactSettings.tags.create; (5) AI defaults flipped to opt-in (all false) in schema + a no-op migration (20260414130000_contact_ai_defaults_complete) restates the two already-false columns so migration history matches schema verbatim; (6) automation.resetToDefaults router procedure added and wired to UI Reset action; (7) colorToken CHECK constraint added; (8) tenant-isolation negative test added for tags.delete; (9) PRD extended with AC-C12..C19; (10) assertRequiredContactFields update-mode now treats explicit `undefined` as 'do not touch' (regression test added) so partial updates do not trigger spurious BAD_REQUEST. Remaining gaps by design: 3 automation toggles explicitly marked 'pending' in UI (autoMergeOnExactEmail, notifyOnDuplicate, notifyOnOwnerChange — need duplicate-detection + notification infra); all 5 AI toggles marked 'pending' (need AI chain consumers). Validation matrix: Gate 4 (Build) still exit_code -1 because the pre-existing sibling PG-183 account-settings router references a Prisma model not yet in schema; this blocker is unchanged since the pre-hardening attestation and outside PG-182's scope. Verdict remains NEEDS_HUMAN for that reason only.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test --run contact-settings && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test --run contact-settings contact-automation && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test --run contact-settings

kpi_results.name: Total tests passing (validators + api + web, contact-settings scope)
kpi_results.actual: 84 (validators 20 + api 44 + web 20) — of which 33 are net-new vs. the pre-audit delivery
